Fact.Name: Statutory employee
Fact.Description: Schedule C line 1 checkbox. Income was reported on Form W-2 with the statutory employee box checked.

Fact.Name: Gross receipts or sales
Fact.Description: Schedule C line 1. Gross receipts or sales.

Fact.Name: Returns and allowances
Fact.Description: Schedule C line 2. Returns and allowances.

Fact.Name: Net receipts
Fact.Description: Schedule C line 3. Subtract line 2 from line 1.

Fact.Name: Cost of goods sold
Fact.Description: Schedule C line 4. Cost of goods sold (from line 42).

Fact.Name: Gross profit
Fact.Description: Schedule C line 5. Subtract line 4 from line 3.

Fact.Name: Other income
Fact.Description: Schedule C line 6. Other income, including federal and state gasoline or fuel tax credit or refund.

Fact.Name: Gross income
Fact.Description: Schedule C line 7. Add lines 5 and 6.

Fact.Name: Advertising
Fact.Description: Schedule C line 8. Advertising.

Fact.Name: Car and truck expenses
Fact.Description: Schedule C line 9. Car and truck expenses.

Fact.Name: Commissions and fees
Fact.Description: Schedule C line 10. Commissions and fees.

Fact.Name: Contract labor
Fact.Description: Schedule C line 11. Contract labor.

Fact.Name: Depletion
Fact.Description: Schedule C line 12. Depletion.

Fact.Name: Depreciation and section 179
Fact.Description: Schedule C line 13. Depreciation and section 179 expense deduction (not included in Part III).

Fact.Name: Employee benefit programs
Fact.Description: Schedule C line 14. Employee benefit programs (other than on line 19).

Fact.Name: Insurance
Fact.Description: Schedule C line 15. Insurance (other than health).

Fact.Name: Mortgage interest
Fact.Description: Schedule C line 16a. Interest on mortgage (paid to banks, etc.).

Fact.Name: Other interest
Fact.Description: Schedule C line 16b. Other interest.

Fact.Name: Legal and professional services
Fact.Description: Schedule C line 17. Legal and professional services.

Fact.Name: Office expense
Fact.Description: Schedule C line 18. Office expense.

Fact.Name: Pension and profit-sharing plans
Fact.Description: Schedule C line 19. Pension and profit-sharing plans.

Fact.Name: Rent — vehicles, machinery, equipment
Fact.Description: Schedule C line 20a. Rent or lease of vehicles, machinery, and equipment.

Fact.Name: Rent — other business property
Fact.Description: Schedule C line 20b. Rent or lease of other business property.

Fact.Name: Repairs and maintenance
Fact.Description: Schedule C line 21. Repairs and maintenance.

Fact.Name: Supplies
Fact.Description: Schedule C line 22. Supplies (not included in Part III).

Fact.Name: Taxes and licenses
Fact.Description: Schedule C line 23. Taxes and licenses.

Fact.Name: Travel
Fact.Description: Schedule C line 24a. Travel.

Fact.Name: Deductible meals
Fact.Description: Schedule C line 24b. Deductible meals.

Fact.Name: Utilities
Fact.Description: Schedule C line 25. Utilities.

Fact.Name: Wages
Fact.Description: Schedule C line 26. Wages (less employment credits).

Fact.Name: Energy efficient commercial buildings deduction
Fact.Description: Schedule C line 27a. Energy efficient commercial buildings deduction (Form 7205).

Fact.Name: Other expenses
Fact.Description: Schedule C line 27b. Other expenses (from line 48).

Fact.Name: Total expenses
Fact.Description: Schedule C line 28. Total expenses before expenses for business use of home. Add lines 8 through 27b.

Fact.Name: Tentative profit or loss
Fact.Description: Schedule C line 29. Subtract line 28 from line 7.

Fact.Name: Total home square footage
Fact.Description: Schedule C line 30(a). Total square footage of your home.

Fact.Name: Business square footage
Fact.Description: Schedule C line 30(b). Square footage of home used for business.

Fact.Name: Allowable square footage
Fact.Description: Simplified method worksheet line 2. Lesser of business sqft or 300.

Fact.Name: Simplified method deduction
Fact.Description: Simplified method worksheet line 4. Allowable sqft times $5.

Fact.Name: Gross income limitation
Fact.Description: Simplified method worksheet line 1. Tentative profit floored at zero.

Fact.Name: Business use of home expenses
Fact.Description: Schedule C line 30. Simplified method: lesser of deduction or gross income limit.

Fact.Name: Net profit or loss
Fact.Description: Schedule C line 31. Subtract line 30 from line 29. Enter on Schedule 1 line 3 and Schedule SE line 2.

Fact.Name: All investment at risk
Fact.Description: Schedule C line 32a. All investment is at risk.

Fact.Name: Some investment not at risk
Fact.Description: Schedule C line 32b. Some investment is not at risk.

Fact.Name: Beginning inventory
Fact.Description: Schedule C line 35. Inventory at beginning of year.

Fact.Name: Purchases
Fact.Description: Schedule C line 36. Purchases less cost of items withdrawn for personal use.

Fact.Name: Cost of labor
Fact.Description: Schedule C line 37. Cost of labor. Do not include any amounts paid to yourself.

Fact.Name: Materials and supplies
Fact.Description: Schedule C line 38. Materials and supplies.

Fact.Name: Other costs
Fact.Description: Schedule C line 39. Other costs.

Fact.Name: Total before inventory
Fact.Description: Schedule C line 40. Add lines 35 through 39.

Fact.Name: Ending inventory
Fact.Description: Schedule C line 41. Inventory at end of year.

Fact.Name: Cost of goods sold
Fact.Description: Schedule C line 42. Subtract line 41 from line 40. Enter the result here and on line 4.

Fact.Name: Total other expenses
Fact.Description: Schedule C line 48. Total other expenses. Enter here and on line 27b.
